## Problem

What workflow problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful solution.

## Source-Truth Impact

Does this change affect preflight, review artifacts, cross-audit, merge gate, hashes, or `state.json`?

## Alternatives

What other approach did you consider?
